title: LUMA - Compatibility Dating
shortDescription: Science-based dating. Find your match with 45 compatibility questions.
fullDescription:
LUMA is a premium dating app that goes beyond superficial swiping. Our scientific compatibility algorithm connects you with people who truly match your personality, values, and lifestyle.

SCIENTIFIC COMPATIBILITY ANALYSIS
LUMA uses 45 carefully crafted compatibility questions to analyze your personality, values, and lifestyle preferences. With deep matching across 15 compatibility dimensions, we go far beyond surface-level attraction. Get recommendations based on real compatibility, not just appearance.

HARMONY ROOM — INTERACTIVE DATING
Harmony Room offers a structured getting-to-know-you experience with your matches. Shared questions, icebreaker activities, and guided conversation topics make it easy to take the first step. Say goodbye to awkward silences and hello to meaningful conversations.

SELFIE VERIFICATION FOR SAFETY
Every LUMA user goes through a selfie verification process. Fake profiles, catfishing, and bot accounts are blocked. Be confident that the person you are talking to is real.

15 COMPATIBILITY DIMENSIONS
Communication style, conflict resolution, social energy, future plans, values, life pace, and more... LUMA analyzes all the dimensions that make a relationship successful and provides you with a detailed compatibility report.

INTENTION MATCHING
Looking for a serious relationship, exploring, or not sure yet? LUMA's intention tags connect you with people who share the same goals.

4 PACKAGE OPTIONS
- Free: Basic matching and limited likes
- Gold: Unlimited likes, see who liked you, advanced filters
- Pro: Priority visibility, super likes, undo
- Reserved: VIP experience, exclusive badge, priority support

PRIVACY FIRST
Your data is protected in compliance with GDPR. You can freeze your profile at any time, export your data, or permanently delete your account.

With LUMA, dating is based on science, not chance. Download now, answer 45 questions, and discover the person who is right for you!
